title: ECL root-cause-report profile v1 (vendored for VIGIL v1.1.0)
description: Vendored copy of eidolons-ecl schemas/per-eidolon/root-cause-report.v1.json with _base-profile.v1.json constraints inlined. Strict subset of the local schemas/root-cause-report.v1.json. VIGIL emits after V→I→G→I→L cycle; consumed by APIVR-Δ (or SPECTRA/IDG for systemic findings). Source: ECL v1.0 (published 2026-05-08).

version.description: SemVer of the emitting VIGIL instance.

evidence_anchors_count.description: Number of path:line citations in the body.

reproduction_runs.description: VIGIL P0 (I-1): >=2 deterministic runs OR statistical CI >=85%. Mirrors local schema constraint.

reproduction_ci.description: Statistical confidence interval when reproduction_mode is statistical.

hypotheses_count.description: VIGIL P0 (I-3): >=3 hypotheses before any intervention. Mirrors local schema constraint.

interventions_count.description: VIGIL P0 (I-5): <=5 intervention budget. Mirrors local schema constraint.

blame_target.description: path:line of the root cause. VIGIL P0 (I-7): evidence-anchored.

verified_patch_path.description: Optional path to verified-patch.diff (emitted when authority >= sandbox and survivor was code-change type).

non_determinism_declared.description: VIGIL P0 (I-8): true if [FLAKE] mode was active during this mission.
